welcomeMessageTop: A warm welcome to our Spondon Dynamo Bolts grassroots team.
welcomeMessageBottom: We play in the Derby Junior League and train in Spondon!

about.description: We are a passionate grassroots football team for under 7s, playing in the Derby Junior League and training in Spondon.

sponsors.name: Impact Academy Derby
sponsors.description: Proud sponsor of Spondon Dynamo Bolts. Impact Academy Derby supports youth sports and community engagement.

sponsors.name: Lonsdale Swimming Pool
sponsors.description: Lonsdale Swimming Pool is a local business dedicated to providing quality swimming facilities and community engagement.
